title: Spanish-Speaking Cultures
shortSummary: Understand the cultural contexts behind the language — from Spain to Latin America. Festivals, customs, etiquette, humour, and the cultural knowledge that makes you sound like more than just a textbook speaker.
whyItMatters: Language without culture is just words. Understanding cultural context — why Spaniards eat dinner at 10pm, how formality differs between Mexico and Argentina, what festivals matter — makes your Spanish authentic and your interactions meaningful.
coreConcepts: Cultural differences: Spain vs Latin America
Key festivals: Día de los Muertos, La Tomatina, Fallas, Carnaval
Food culture across the Spanish-speaking world
Social etiquette: greetings, personal space, time culture
The concept of 'mañana' and time flexibility
